rules: Every music and sfx cue must have source, author, license, commercial-use, and approval status.
Prototype audio may run in development but must not be production-approved.
Production-approved audio cannot have blocked, unknown, or placeholder commercial status.

music:stage-01.source: Procedural source generated by tools/generate-project-audio.mjs in this repository
music:stage-01.author: AlgeriaTechGen / Neon Gauntlet project
music:stage-01.commercialUse: approved for Neon Gauntlet commercial use
music:stage-01.replacementPlan: Keep the source generator in the repository; tune and regenerate if the final art direction changes.
